data.title: What is Merlin Chain and How Does it Work? A Comprehensive Overview
data.description:
"Merlin Chain is a cutting-edge blockchain technology designed to enhance security, scalability, and efficiency in various applications. In this comprehensive overview, we will explore the fundamental aspects of Merlin Chain, including its underlying architecture, key features, and the innovative mechanisms that drive its operation. Additionally, we will delve into its practical applications and the potential impact it may have on industries ranging from finance to supply chain management, providing you with a thorough understanding of what Merlin Chain is and how it functions."
source: https://blocknews.com/what-is-merlin-chain-and-how-does-it-work-a-comprehensive-overview/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 1,110 USDT with a Narrowed 0.42% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 24, 2025, 22:27 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 1,110 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,110.099976 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.42% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Federal Reserve rolls back bank stress tests in long‑sought victory for Wall Street
data.description:
The Federal Reserve announced a major overhaul of its annual bank stress tests after a legal challenge from multiple industry groups, according to a press release from the central bank on Friday. The changes respond to complaints that the process used to determine how much capital large banks must hold was opaque, unpredictable, and costly […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fed-rolls-back-bank-stress-tests/

data.title: XRP Flashes TD Buy Signal: Start Of Fresh Rally?
data.description:
A cryptocurrency analyst has pointed out how a rebound could be about to begin for XRP after the Tom Demark (TD) Sequential flashed a buy signal. TD Sequential Has Given A Buy Signal For XRP In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has talked about a TD Sequential signal that has appeared on XRP’s 4-hour price chart. The TD Sequential refers to a technical analysis (TA) indicator that’s generally used for locating points of probable reversal in any asset’s price. The indicator involves two phases: the setup and countdown
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/xrp-news/xrp-flashes-td-buy-signal-start-of-fresh-rally/
